name: twork/rad-faq-item
title: FAQ Item
description: Single FAQ item (question + answer) for the Radiology Preparation FAQ section.

question.default: Do I need to fast before a CT Scan?

answer.default: Yes, usually 4-6 hours of fasting is required for abdominal CT scans, especially if contrast dye is used.

attributes.question: Do I need to fast before a CT Scan?
attributes.answer: Yes, usually 4-6 hours of fasting is required for abdominal CT scans, especially if contrast dye is used.
